title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Birlasoft - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Birlasoft - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Birlasoft:
Birlasoft is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft!
